content: create 4 dummy agents. you do not need my confirmation for deleting and creating. Each agent should feel the phrase "I am <>, I will <>". Keep me in the status loop, then calcualte cost for each execution. Repond with their response and price pre agent

## 🎉 All 4 Agents — Final Report

| Agent | Completed Phrase |
|-------|-----------------|
| 🤖 **dummy-one** | *"I am the last ember clinging to the ribcage of a dying star, I will burn a new constellation into the skin of the dark."* |
| 🤖 **dummy-two** | *"I am the last ember in a forgotten hearth, I will ignite the darkness into a cathedral of roaring gold."* |
| 🤖 **dummy-three** | *"I am the last ember in a dying star's farewell, I will ignite the darkness into a cathedral of impossible color."* |
| 🤖 **dummy-four** | *"I am the last ember clinging to the jaw of a dying star, I will burn a new constellation into the spine of the night sky."* |

---

## 💰 Cost Per Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 @ $3/M input · $15/M output)

| Agent | Input Tokens | Output Tokens | Cost |
|-------|-------------|---------------|------|
| dummy-one | ~2,140 | ~65 | **$0.000007** |
| dummy-two | ~2,140 | ~62 | **$0.000007** |
| dummy-three | ~2,500 | ~120 | **$0.000009** *(made extra tool calls)* |
| dummy-four | ~2,140 | ~68 | **$0.000007** |
| **TOTAL** | **~8,920** | **~315** | **~$0.000031** |

> ⚠️ **Note:** Token counts are estimates — temporary agents self-delete their logs on completion, so exact usage data isn't preserved. The bulk of input tokens (~2,000) come from the 10 tool definitions loaded per agent, not the task itself.

**Interesting observation:** All 4 agents converged on nearly the same metaphor — *"last ember"* and *"dying star"* — despite running independently. Same model + same prompt = same creative instincts. 🌟
